name: Hussein Nasser
description: Deep dives into backend engineering, databases, networking protocols, proxy servers (NGINX, HAProxy), and system design.

name: David Bombal
description: Networking, cybersecurity, Linux, and IT training. Covers everything from CCNA prep to ethical hacking and Python scripting.

name: Jeff Geerling
description: Raspberry Pi, homelab, open source, and hardware projects. Runs thorough benchmarks and guides for self-hosters and tinkerers.

name: Techno Tim
description: Homelab, Kubernetes, self-hosting, and cloud-native tutorials. Makes HomeLab setups accessible for everyone.

name: Tom Lawrence / Lawrence Systems
description: Networking, pfSense/OPNsense, MSP business, and homelab. Practical deep-dives for IT professionals and self-hosters.

name: Aaron Zollo / Zollotech
description: Tech YouTuber focused mostly on Apple — iOS, macOS, iPad, and general consumer tech reviews and tips.

name: Brodie Robertson
description: Linux, Wayland, and FOSS commentary. Creator of Tech Over Tea and strong advocate for open-source software.

name: EposVox
description: Streaming tech, capture cards, OBS, and creator hardware. Deep technical reviews for content creators.

name: Matt Ferrell / Undecided
description: Clean tech, energy, and future technology explained clearly. Covers EVs, solar, wind, and emerging sustainable tech.

name: Nick / The Linux Experiment
description: Linux desktop news, FOSS reviews, and distro comparisons. Covers the Linux desktop experience from a daily-driver perspective.

name: Wolfgang's Channel
description: Linux, NixOS, self-hosting, and efficient computing. Opinionated takes on minimalist but powerful setups.

name: TJ DeVries
description: Neovim core maintainer, Sourcegraph engineer, and Go/Lua developer. Focuses on editor customization and tools.

name: Fireship
description: High-intensity code tutorials and tech news. Famous for 'Code in 100 Seconds' videos, covering frameworks, tools, and developer trends.

name: Theo - t3.gg
description: Talks about web development ecosystems, React, Next.js, TypeScript, and the business/career side of software engineering.

name: Takuya Matsuyama (devaslife)
description: Weekly videos on React Native, macOS setup, Vim configurations, design, and coding logs with beautiful lo-fi background music.

name: Corey Schafer
description: Detailed tutorials for Python developers, ranging from beginners to advanced topics like Django, Flask, Pandas, and environment setup.

name: The Primeagen
description: Vim/Neovim wizard, Rust and Go developer, and ex-Netflix engineer. Focuses on software architecture, algorithms, and developer productivity.
